creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 0.9.4

Adding --without-docs to CONFIGURE_ARGS will leave an empty DOCSDIR.
Therefore we use REINPLACE_CMD to skip 'docs' subdir in Makefile.

Port maintainer (fluffy@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: CVS)
